# Test Fixtures

Sample documents for testing document type conversion and extraction.

| File | Format | Source | Size |
|------|--------|--------|------|
| `sample.pdf` | PDF 1.7 | [freetestdata.com](https://freetestdata.com) | 100KB |
| `sample.docx` | Word 2007+ | [freetestdata.com](https://freetestdata.com) | 101KB |
| `sample.doc` | Word 97-2003 | [freetestdata.com](https://freetestdata.com) | 101KB |
| `sample.pptx` | PowerPoint 2007+ | [freetestdata.com](https://freetestdata.com) | 101KB |
| `sample.xlsx` | Excel 2007+ | [freetestdata.com](https://freetestdata.com) | 101KB |
| `sample.odt` | OpenDocument Text | Generated | 1KB |
| `sample.rtf` | Rich Text Format | Generated | 1KB |
| `sample.html` | HTML | Generated | 1KB |

These files are used by `tests/test_doctypes.py` and `tests/test_e2e_anthropic.py`.
